sql_array: CREATE TABLE rank_test (id Int32, value_x Float64, value_y Float64);
INSERT INTO rank_test (id, value_x, value_y) VALUES (1, 1.1, 2.2), (2, 2.2, 3.3), (3, 3.3, 1.1);
UPDATE rank_test SET value_x = value_x + 1.0 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT SUM(value_x) AS total_x, rankCorr(SUM(value_x), SUM(value_y)) FROM rank_test;
